skill.name: quality-manager-qmr
skill.description: Quality Manager Responsible Person guidance for HealthTech and MedTech teams that need quality system governance, regulatory oversight, management review planning, and strategic quality leadership.
skill.summary: Guide HealthTech and MedTech quality governance with QMR frameworks for compliance, reviews, KPIs, and leadership planning.
skill.author: alirezarezvani

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer reported many high-risk patterns, but the cited lines are documentation, markdown formatting, or prior evaluation text. I found no evidence of prompt injection, credential access, network calls, weak cryptography, or command execution intent in the reviewed files.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Detections Are False Positives
low_findings.description: Static weak-cryptography alerts point to QMR, R&D, placeholder asset text, and evaluation content. No evidence found for cryptographic APIs, weak hashing, encryption, or password handling.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed locations contain regulatory and documentation terms, not cryptographic code. The package has no observed crypto operations in the cited files.

low_findings.title: Markdown Backtick Detections Are False Positives
low_findings.description: The external-command alerts point to markdown fences and inline filenames. No evidence found for shell execution, Ruby backticks, dynamic command construction, or command invocation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited lines are markdown code fences or resource-name formatting. They do not include executable commands or user-controlled inputs.

low_findings.title: Environment And Network Detections Are False Positives
low_findings.description: The configuration and network reconnaissance alerts point to management review text, regulatory communication wording, and prior evaluation examples. No evidence found for environment variable reads or network scanning behavior.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line context is quality management and regulatory documentation. There are no environment APIs, host probes, scanners, or outbound network instructions at these locations.

content.value_statement: HealthTech and MedTech teams must keep quality systems aligned with changing regulatory duties. This skill helps structure QMR oversight, management reviews, KPIs, and compliance planning.
actual_capabilities: Define QMR responsibility matrices for quality system governance.
Plan management review agendas, inputs, outputs, and follow-up actions.
Map compliance oversight across ISO 13485, EU MDR, and FDA QSR topics.
Design quality KPI dashboards for leadership reporting.
Outline quality culture programs and training priorities.
Structure document control, audit, and change control oversight.
limitations: It provides guidance, not legal or regulatory certification advice.
It does not replace a qualified quality or regulatory professional.
It does not verify live QMS records or external systems.
Referenced advanced resource files are described but not included.

use_cases.title: Build QMS Governance
use_cases.description: Create a QMR responsibility model, escalation path, and oversight cadence for a growing quality system.

use_cases.title: Prepare Management Reviews
use_cases.description: Plan quarterly review content with KPIs, audit status, compliance risks, and documented action tracking.

use_cases.title: Coordinate Regulatory Oversight
use_cases.description: Organize compliance monitoring across ISO 13485, EU MDR, FDA QSR, and authority interactions.

prompt_templates.title: Create A QMR Role Map
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a QMR responsibility matrix for a MedTech company with 40 employees. Include governance duties, escalation triggers, and leadership reporting.

prompt_templates.title: Plan A Management Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Draft a quarterly management review agenda for a medical device company. Include required inputs, decisions, owners, and follow-up tracking.

prompt_templates.title: Assess Compliance Oversight
prompt_templates.prompt: Review our quality governance approach for ISO 13485, EU MDR, and FDA QSR. Identify oversight gaps and propose prioritized remediation actions.

prompt_templates.title: Design A Quality Strategy
prompt_templates.prompt: Develop a one-year quality strategy for a HealthTech company entering the EU and US markets. Include KPIs, resource needs, risks, and board reporting.

output_examples.input: Create a management review agenda for our medical device company.
output: Quarterly management review agenda with quality system performance, audit status, CAPA trends, customer feedback, regulatory risks, and action tracking.
Each topic includes an owner, evidence source, decision need, and due date for follow-up.

output_examples.input: Help define QMR responsibilities for our startup.
output: A QMR responsibility matrix covering quality policy, quality objectives, regulatory oversight, document control, audit governance, and management reporting.
The matrix separates accountable leaders, process owners, reviewers, and escalation contacts.

output_examples.input: Suggest quality KPIs for executive reporting.
output: A leadership KPI set with audit findings, CAPA aging, complaint trends, training completion, supplier quality, submission readiness, and quality cost indicators.
Each KPI includes a purpose, review frequency, data owner, and recommended escalation threshold.

best_practices: Tie quality objectives to measurable business and regulatory outcomes.
Document management review decisions, owners, and due dates.
Use human expert review before regulatory submissions or authority responses.
anti_patterns: Treating QMR duties as paperwork instead of management accountability.
Using generic compliance checklists without jurisdiction-specific review.
Reporting quality KPIs without owners, thresholds, or corrective actions.

faq.question: What does this skill help create?
faq.answer: It helps create QMR governance models, management review plans, quality KPIs, compliance oversight maps, and quality strategy outlines.

faq.question: Is this legal or regulatory advice?
faq.answer: No. It provides practical quality management guidance that should be reviewed by qualified regulatory and legal professionals.

faq.question: Which standards does it reference?
faq.answer: It references ISO 13485, EU MDR 2017/745, FDA QSR 21 CFR 820, and general quality management practices.

faq.question: Can it prepare management review materials?
faq.answer: Yes. It can structure agendas, review inputs, action trackers, quality dashboards, and executive reporting themes.

faq.question: Does it connect to QMS software?
faq.answer: No. It does not integrate with live QMS systems, databases, document repositories, or external compliance tools.

faq.question: Who should use this skill?
faq.answer: Quality leaders, regulatory affairs managers, and executives in HealthTech or MedTech organizations can use it for planning and oversight.
